# examples.dialog.MainContainer: re-add the animated & modal change listeners

use cases:
* open a non-modal dialog, check the modal checkbox => we get the modal mask. opposite direction not possible (checkbox disabled)
* open a non-animated dialog, check the animated checkbox to hide it with an animation
* open an animated dialog, uncheck the animated checkbox to hide it without an animation
